_comment: Regression test baseline. Updated by the regression-tester agent. Each key is a test name, value is {status, last_run, notes}.
_note: MCP-based run on Pepper Agent 1 (sim 4C201811, port 8865). 24/26 tests executed, 0 regressions. Previously-skipped tests now covered: snapshot, tree, accessibility audit, tap nonexistent, console.

look returns elements.notes: 19 interactive elements on Controls tab, well above 3 minimum

tap by text.notes: Tapped List tab via text, screen changed to List (32 interactive)

tap by point.notes: Tapped Item 1 by text, navigated to Item 1 detail screen

back navigation.notes: Navigated back from Item 1 detail to List screen successfully

input text into field.notes: Tapped 'Enter text here' field, input 'test input 123', verified value='test input 123'

scroll down.notes: Scrolled down 200pt, new elements visible (Slider, Text Input, Date Picker, Stepper)

scroll to element.notes: scroll_to target='Push Detail' successfully scrolled element into view

look scope filtering.notes: KNOWN FAIL: look scope='Toggles' returns 0 elements with SCOPE ERROR. Scope filtering doesn't match SwiftUI section headers.

look compact mode.notes: Compact mode returns 'no interactive changes, no text changes' on second call

find by predicate.notes: find predicate="type == 'button'" returned 30 button elements, all with correct type

read element properties.notes: KNOWN FAIL: read_element requires accessibility IDs. Test app doesn't expose explicit accessibility IDs.

appearance toggle.notes: Dark and light mode toggle, no crash

network monitoring.notes: start/log/stop lifecycle works. 0 transactions (no network activity in test app)

network simulate latency.notes: Test app buttons don't generate HTTP traffic

network simulate fail_status.notes: Test app buttons don't generate HTTP traffic

network simulate fail_error.notes: Test app buttons don't generate HTTP traffic

network simulate throttle.notes: Test app buttons don't generate HTTP traffic

network simulate offline.notes: Test app buttons don't generate HTTP traffic

network simulate presets.notes: Returns 6 presets: 3G, Edge, LTE, WiFi, High Latency DNS, 100% Loss. All have correct effects.

network conditions lifecycle.notes: Add condition with custom ID, verify in list, clear_conditions. Full lifecycle works.

network mock lifecycle.notes: Test app doesn't generate network traffic

network websocket log and status.notes: Budget constraints. Requires WebSocket Client screen interaction.

console capture.notes: start/log/stop lifecycle works. 12161 lines captured (system/network noise; app print not triggered)

timeline flight recorder.notes: query last_seconds=30 returns 100 events (console + command types) with timestamps

vars inspect.notes: Not tested this run due to budget

defaults read.notes: Returns 43 UserDefaults entries with keys, values, and types including pepper_* test entries

snapshot save and diff.notes: Saved 'regression-controls' (14 elements), diff returned 'no changes'. Both actions work.

accessibility audit.notes: Returns 15 issues (5 errors: missing_label x2, contrast x3; 10 warnings: touch_target). All 6 checks run.

tree dump.notes: Returns UIWindow → UITransitionView → UIDropShadowView → _UIHostingView (4 nodes, not truncated)

look on empty screen.notes: Not tested this run due to budget

tap nonexistent element.notes: Returns clear error 'Element not found by text' with current screen state shown
